text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Phew! My throat is wiped! I need to take a break
from all this singing.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm such an amazing singer! It's a shame no
one's around to hear this.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Aw, come on! I wanna sing some more!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wait... Wasn't I supposed to train today?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh well! I need a break from time to time. 'Sides,
I'm already the best anyways! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'll text everyone to see if they're up for some
singing and dancing at this karaoke joint!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, hello? Yes, I'd like to extend my time,
please! By a lot!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! It's all coming together! Today's gonna be
so fun!
